themes.noirPinkDesc: The original black and neon-pink NoirSound look.
themes.midnightBlueDesc: Cold blue light over a late-night studio.
themes.crimsonRedDesc: Deep black and red with underground-club energy.
themes.royalPurpleDesc: Dark violet with a polished cyber-nightlife feel.
themes.emeraldDarkDesc: Analog studio green on a deep dark surface.
themes.lightMinimalDesc: A clean, bright workspace with premium contrast.
themes.systemDesc: Follow this device’s light or dark appearance.

themeDescriptions.greenStream: Deep black surfaces with fresh green streaming energy.
themeDescriptions.orangeWave: Warm orange accents for a creator-first audio feel.
